channel.title: Configuration on stultus notes
channel.description: Recent content in Configuration on stultus notes

item.title: The Nginx sites-available/sites-enabled Split Is a Debian Convention
item.description: Nginx loads what its include directives reference. The two-directory split for site configs is a Debian-flavoured human workflow, not a runtime feature.

item.title: Bazel BUILD Style Guide
item.description: Official Bazel style guide recommending DAMP over DRY for BUILD files.

item.title: DAMP Principle
item.description: Descriptive and Meaningful Phrases - a principle encouraging readability over uniqueness.
